text:
## Governance Framework  
### Decision-Making Authority  
| Decision Type | Authority | Approval Required |
|---------------|-----------|-------------------|
| Product Launch | Board Risk Committee | Board, CRO, Business Unit Head |
| Policy Changes | Compliance Committee | CRO, COO, CEO |
| Technology Investment >£500k | Board Technology Committee | Board, CTO, CFO |
| Pricing Changes | Executive Committee | CEO, CFO, Business Unit Head |
| Risk Exceptions | Risk Committee | CRO, CEO |
| Customer Escalations | Management | Department Head + Escalation Matrix |  
**See:** Escalation Matrix (ESC-001)  
---
name: Chunk 12/24

raw_entities.name: Board Risk Committee
raw_entities.description: Serves as the primary decision-making authority for product launches within FirstUK Bank's governance framework, overseeing commercial and risk-aligned product introductions.

raw_entities.name: Compliance Committee
raw_entities.description: Governs and approves internal policy changes, ensuring alignment with regulatory standards and bank-wide operational guidelines.

raw_entities.name: Board Technology Committee
raw_entities.description: Acts as the governing body for technology investments exceeding specified financial thresholds, ensuring strategic alignment and capital efficiency.

raw_entities.name: Executive Committee
raw_entities.description: Holds decision-making authority over pricing changes and strategic commercial adjustments across business units.

raw_entities.name: Risk Committee
raw_entities.description: Responsible for evaluating and approving risk exceptions that fall outside standard risk appetite parameters or predefined thresholds.

raw_entities.name: Management
raw_entities.description: Oversees customer escalations through established departmental leadership and structured escalation protocols to resolve complex client issues.

raw_entities.name: Chief Risk Officer
raw_entities.description: C-suite executive required to co-approve product launches, policy changes, risk exceptions, and technology investments exceeding the defined budget threshold.

raw_entities.name: Chief Executive Officer
raw_entities.description: Top executive required for approving policy changes, pricing changes, risk exceptions, and customer escalations per the governance framework.
context: Executive Committee | CEO, CFO, Business Unit Head

raw_entities.name: Chief Operating Officer
raw_entities.description: Executive responsible for co-approving policy changes alongside the CEO and CRO, ensuring operational feasibility and compliance.

raw_entities.name: Chief Technology Officer
raw_entities.description: Required approver for technology investments exceeding £500k, working with the Board and CFO to validate technical strategy and capital allocation.

raw_entities.name: Chief Financial Officer
raw_entities.description: Co-approves pricing changes and technology investments over the specified budget threshold, ensuring financial viability and margin alignment.
context: Executive Committee | CEO, CFO, Business Unit Head

raw_entities.name: Business Unit Head
raw_entities.description: Departmental leader required to approve product launches, pricing changes, and customer escalations, bridging commercial strategy with operational execution.
context: Executive Committee | CEO, CFO, Business Unit Head

raw_entities.name: Board
raw_entities.description: Senior governance body required to approve product launches and technology investments exceeding £500k, providing ultimate oversight on strategic decisions.

raw_entities.name: Department Head
raw_entities.description: Operational leader responsible for managing customer escalations in conjunction with the defined Escalation Matrix (ESC-001) and senior management.
context: Customer Escalations | Management | Department Head + Escalation Matrix

raw_entities.name: Technology Investment Budget Threshold
raw_entities.description: Quantitative financial threshold defining when technology investments require Board Technology Committee authority and multi-executive approval.

raw_entities.name: Product Launch Approval Rule
raw_entities.description: Mandates that product launches are governed by the Board Risk Committee and require joint approval from the Board, CRO, and Business Unit Head.

raw_entities.name: Policy Changes Approval Rule
raw_entities.description: Requires policy changes to be authorized by the Compliance Committee with mandatory approval from the CRO, COO, and CEO.

raw_entities.name: Technology Investment Approval Rule
raw_entities.description: Constrains technology investments exceeding £500k to Board Technology Committee authority, requiring approval from the Board, CTO, and CFO.

raw_entities.name: Pricing Changes Approval Rule
raw_entities.description: Dictates that pricing changes fall under Executive Committee authority and require joint sign-off from the CEO, CFO, and Business Unit Head.

raw_entities.name: Risk Exceptions Approval Rule
raw_entities.description: Assigns risk exception decisions to the Risk Committee, mandating approval from the CRO and CEO.

raw_entities.name: Customer Escalations Handling Rule
raw_entities.description: Governs customer escalations under Management authority, requiring Department Head involvement per the defined Escalation Matrix (ESC-001).

properties.what_it_measures: Minimum investment amount triggering Board Technology Committee approval
properties.context: Governance framework for technology capital allocation

properties.rule_statement: Product launches require joint approval from the Board Risk Committee, Board, CRO, and Business Unit Head.
Policy changes require joint approval from the Compliance Committee, CRO, COO, and CEO.
Technology investments exceeding £500k require joint approval from the Board Technology Committee, Board, CTO, and CFO.
Pricing changes require joint approval from the Executive Committee, CEO, CFO, and Business Unit Head.
Risk exceptions require joint approval from the Risk Committee, CRO, and CEO.
Customer escalations are handled by Management via the Department Head and a defined Escalation Matrix.

relationships.description: Holds primary decision-making authority for product launch approvals within the governance framework.
Required signatory for product launch decisions alongside the Board Risk Committee.
relationships.context: Board Risk Committee | Board, CRO, Business Unit Head

relationships.description: Required signatory for product launch decisions to ensure risk alignment.
relationships.context: Board Risk Committee | Board, CRO, Business Unit Head

relationships.description: Required signatory for product launch decisions representing commercial interests.
relationships.context: Board Risk Committee | Board, CRO, Business Unit Head

relationships.description: Holds primary decision-making authority for policy change approvals within the governance framework.
Required signatory for policy change decisions to assess risk implications.
Required signatory for policy change decisions to ensure operational feasibility.
Required signatory for policy change decisions representing ultimate executive authority.
Holds primary decision-making authority for technology investment approvals exceeding £500k.
Required signatory for technology investment decisions requiring board-level oversight.
relationships.context: Board Technology Committee | Board, CTO, CFO

relationships.description: Required signatory for technology investment decisions to validate technical strategy.
relationships.context: Board Technology Committee | Board, CTO, CFO

relationships.description: Required signatory for technology investment decisions to validate financial viability.
relationships.context: Board Technology Committee | Board, CTO, CFO

relationships.description: Holds primary decision-making authority for pricing change approvals within the governance framework.
Required signatory for pricing change decisions representing ultimate executive authority.
relationships.context: Executive Committee | CEO, CFO, Business Unit Head

relationships.description: Required signatory for pricing change decisions to validate revenue impact.
relationships.context: Executive Committee | CEO, CFO, Business Unit Head

relationships.description: Required signatory for pricing change decisions representing commercial interests.
relationships.context: Executive Committee | CEO, CFO, Business Unit Head

relationships.description: Holds primary decision-making authority for risk exception approvals within the governance framework.
Required signatory for risk exception decisions to assess residual risk exposure.
Required signatory for risk exception decisions representing ultimate executive authority.
Holds primary decision-making authority for customer escalation handling within the governance framework.
Required signatory for customer escalation decisions per the defined escalation matrix.
Owns the budget threshold metric for technology investments, enforcing the >£500k governance trigger.
